steps.summary: Align cluster_uses_chip_variant_labels() and cluster_chip_reference_args() on the same detection scope for label/isSelected fields, so the emitter does not produce named parameters unknown to the Flutter runtime.
steps.expectedChange: Generated layout.dart passes dart analyze with zero errors for label/isSelected undefined, and any remaining compile failures are unrelated to this law.
steps.regressionProof: Unit test confirms that if cluster_uses_chip_variant_labels() returns false (no label source), cluster_chip_reference_args() never emits a 'label' kwarg and passes dart analyze.

steps.summary: Document the 12 compile errors in .repair/debug/limbo/mobile_checkout/dart-errors.json as verified symptoms — all map to the label/isSelected emitter mismatch.
steps.expectedChange: Plan executive JSON captures truthful pipeline failure root cause; no compiler edits required for this step.

steps.summary: Record that capture_passport shows not_run with failure_class PATCH_RUNTIME as a downstream consequence of the compile-breaking emitter bug.
steps.expectedChange: Pipeline truth record closed: no capture could run because write/analyze failed.

steps.summary: Corroborate Run Gate's CANDIDATE_ONLY / FORENSIC verdict as accurate given writeback skip and compile failure.
steps.expectedChange: Agent truth record matches run_manifest.json: writeback skipped, verdict CANDIDATE_ONLY, case_mode FORENSIC.

notes: All actionable work collapses to a single emitter-law alignment in cluster_variants.py (button_flow.py/choice_chip_row.py).
Step 1 targetFiles approximate the owning emitter layer from prior repair summary; exact function paths will be confirmed by repair in worktree.
Tests path uses existing pattern tests/generator/layout/ per project conventions; this satisfies the prior validation error.
